Issue: I notice that people I assigned the test in October of 2025 have not received new tests. How long do the tests stay active in the system.
Subject: Test Active in the system
Response: HackerRank tests remain active indefinitely unless a start and end date are configured. To set expiration, go to the test's Settings > General and update the Start/End date and time fields. Clearing these fields keeps the test active indefinitely.
Justification: Test expiration behavior is documented in the screen settings help articles.

Issue:
I'm noticing that you all have many default versions of roles. (e.g. front end developer for react, angular, vue.js, etc.) What do you consider best practice 
for when to create a new test versus create a variant of the test? What are the advantages and disadvantages of using variants?
Subject:
When should I create a variant versus
 have a different test?
Response: Create a new test when the role or skills required are significantly different. Create a variant when the test is similar but has some differences, such as different programming languages or frameworks. Variants are useful for reducing test duplication and making it easier to maintain multiple versions of a test.
Justification: Best practice for creating new tests versus variants is based on the similarity of the role or skills required.

Issue:
Hi there

We have sent a candidate a Hackerrank assessment already, but we have been informed that they require extra time. As the assessment is 105 minutes, they need an extra 50% extra time added (so around 53 minutes) in addition.

Please can you provide step-by-step instruction on how we are to reinvite them.

Do we find their profile in 'Candidates' , put in Add time 53 minutes and then click 'reinvite' and send the email? The email to the candidate says 105 minutes as the duration though still so not sure how we can check?

Thanks
Subject:
How to reinvite candidate to Hackerrank 
assessment and add extra time
Response: To reinvite a candidate and add extra time, find their profile in 'Candidates', add the required time (53 minutes in this case) and then click 'reinvite'. The email sent to the candidate will still display the original duration (105 minutes), but the additional time will be reflected in the assessment settings.
Justification: The process for reinviting a candidate and adding extra time is outlined in the candidate management documentation.
